## What's changing

<!-- One or two sentences. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run validate:data` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] If predictions logic changed: `npm run backtest` run and reviewed (see CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] If event data changed: `lastUpdated` bumped
- [ ] If a slug changed or a new event was added: `data/slug-history.jsonc` appended (see CONTRIBUTING.md ‚Äî slugs are load-bearing for user-facing watchlists)
